changes.description: Tags are now visible throughout the UI — add tags to tasks, filter by tag, and see top tags on the dashboard
Task Type is now a dropdown (Task, Goal, Habit, Meeting, Note, Event) replacing the old free-form text field
Area field (Personal / Work) added to every task — filter your list and see completion split on the dashboard
Activity log now records task creation ('Created' entry)
Activity log records task deletion — visible even after soft-delete
Complete task log no longer incorrectly shows Completed → Completed
Patch endpoint now logs individual field changes instead of a generic 'patch' entry

versions.summary: Unified Audit area and Activity Log API

changes.description: New GET /api/v1/activity-logs endpoint — paginated, filterable task history
Audit page redesigned with two tabs: Task History and API Access
Task detail page shows a Change History table with per-field edits
Activity log filters by task, field, date range, and changed-by
Task management: create, edit, complete, delete with soft-delete
Dashboard with live stats: active, overdue, in-progress, blocked, by type and priority
Kanban board view and list view with search and filters
Tags with colour coding
Recurring tasks with daily, weekly, and monthly patterns
API key management with HMAC-SHA256 hashing
API audit log: every API key request is recorded
Settings page: profile, password, appearance, API keys
Cookie auth for web UI, X-Api-Key header for REST API
